label: Inf_mono
evidence: Label originates from Reynolds et al. 2021 adult healthy skin atlas (E-MTAB-8142), integrated into Gopee et al. 2024 with original annotations. 'Inf_mono' is a standard abbreviation for inflammatory monocyte in skin atlas nomenclature. Mehta et al. 2021 describe 'Infl Mo-like' cells in the Reynolds dataset as CD14bright CD64bright CD163- mononuclear phagocytes.
